question: Berapa jumlah transaksi per hari dari kedua tabel digabung?
predicted_sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN t1.type = 'transaction_enose' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'transaction_enose_per_day', SUM(CASE WHEN t2.type = 'transaction_object_detection' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'transaction_object_detection_per_day' FROM (SELECT user_key, detection_time, COUNT(*) AS value FROM transaction_enose GROUP BY user_key, DATE(detection_time)) t1 FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT device_id, detection_time, COUNT(*) AS value FROM transaction_object_detection GROUP BY device_id, DATE(detection_time)) t2 ON t1.user_key = t2.device_id WHERE t1.user_key IS NOT NULL OR t2.device_id IS NOT NULL
